label: Job vacancy statistics by NACE Rev. 2 activity - quarterly data (from 2001 onwards)

label.NSA: Unadjusted data (i.e. neither seasonally adjusted nor calendar adjusted data)
label.SA: Seasonally adjusted data, not calendar adjusted data

nace_r2.label: Statistical classification of economic activities in the European Community (NACE Rev. 2)

label.A-S: All NACE activities (except activities of households as employers and as own use producers; activities of extra-territorial organisations and bodies)
label.B-S: Industry, construction and services (except activities of households as employers and extra-territorial organisations and bodies)
label.D: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
label.E: Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities
label.G-I: Wholesale and retail trade, transport, accommodation and food service activities
label.G: Wholesale and retail trade; repair of motor vehicles and motorcycles
label.M_N: Professional, scientific and technical activities; administrative and support service activities
label.O-S: Public administration and defence; compulsory social security; education; human health and social work activities; arts, entertainment and recreation; other service activities
label.O-Q: Public administration, defence, education, human health and social work activities
label.O: Public administration and defence; compulsory social security
label.Q: Human health and social work activities
label.R_S: Arts, entertainment and recreation; other service activities

sizeclas.label: Size classes in number of employees

label.JVRCH_Q: Job vacancy quarterly rate of change
